command:
cd /Users/skippy/work/aae-orc/run/switchboard-blue/.worktrees/vp042-bench
echo "=== vet with integration tag ==="
go vet -tags integration ./internal/bench/ 2>&1 | head -20
echo "exit: $?"
echo ""
echo "=== run the testenv-integrated benchmark (500 samples) ==="
go test -tags integration -run '^$' -bench=BenchmarkKeystrokeToEcho_P99 -benchtime=1x -count=1 ./internal/bench/ 2>&1 | tail -25
